description.en: Return the declared dependency specifiers for the named distribution package. Raises PackageNotFoundError if the named distribution package is not installed in the current Python environment.

excerpt.es: Return the declared dependency specifiers for the named distribution package. Raises PackageNotFoundError if the named distribution package is not installed in the current Python environment.
